title: New Moon
body:
# Raven Client has been archived in favor of the upcoming [OptiFine for Fabric v5](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optifine-for-fabric)!
**Want good performance without giving up Lunar Client's features? _New Moon_ is for you!**

With extremely fast performance designed perfectly for Lunar Client, you won't notice any changes to gameplay except less lagbacks and more FPS!

**If you are on the Modrinth website, follow these steps to import _New Moon_ into Lunar Client:**
- Download the modpack
- Open Lunar Client
- Navigate to the Versions tab
- Click the Modrinth icon
- Drag and drop _New Moon_ onto this page
- Click play, and you're ready to go!

**If you are using the Modrinth app, follow these steps to import _New Moon_ into Lunar Client:**
- Click Install
- Navigate to _New Moon_ in the app
- Click the three dots icon
- Click Export modpack
- Select where you want to export the modpack to (it doesn't really matter, just remember where you exported it to)
- Open Lunar Client
- Navigate to the Versions tab
- Click the Modrinth icon
- Drag and drop _New Moon_ onto this page
- Click play, and you're ready to go!

**Note: This modpack is designed specificly for Lunar Client, and will not work on its own. For a mod that has these features, go download my modpack [**OptiFine for Fabric!**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optifine-for-fabric)**
